name: astral
description: Context-budget manager for Claude Code: warns before auto-compact and long-context accuracy degradation, checkpoints finished work, gates large reads, and audits unused agents/skills.

plugins.name: astral
plugins.description: Warns before Claude Code auto-compacts (and before long-context accuracy degrades), lets you checkpoint and shed finished work, gates big file reads to subagents, and shows a context badge in the statusline.
